headline: Is Evergy, Inc. (EVRG) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is EVRG a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Evergy, Inc. on MaxDividends’s Substack by Serhio MaxDividends. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on EVRG. Evergy, Inc.’s share was trading at $82.27 as of June 9th. EVRG’s trailing and forward P/E were 21.87 and 19.30 respectively according to Yahoo […]
